sourceTitle: Guidance for use of Generative AI tools
evidenceSnippetOriginal: No Generative AI tools, including those licensed by IS&T, are approved for use with High Risk MIT information. Additionally, we do not recommend using publicly available GenAI tools not subject to an Institute licensing agreement for your MIT research and educational activities, including with Low Risk or Medium Risk information.
evidenceLocator: Section: 'Protect MIT information and confidential data'
rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
